title: Update avatar agent with BigChungus style

log.context: Update avatar agent with BigChungus style

That existing one is a completely different character — just a dark masked face, not BigChungus-derived at all. So the new `_a` and `_b` variants are the correct direction.

Both are generated and live at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/`. Here's the summary:

**`gigaclungus_a.gif`** — warmer brown palette, rotund rabbit body filling the frame, heavy-lidded eyes, carrot held at side, slow chew animation. More recognizable as BigChungus but still has weight.
